title: Coverage Matrix
description: Persisted at interview_questions_knowledge/coverage_matrix.json. Companies × Categories heatmap built by Loop 5. Cells below threshold queue a targeted Loop-1 mini-sweep on the next pass instead of accepting another over-represented company.

companies.description: Tracked companies. Default set from AGENT.md Tier 5 list.

min_threshold_per_cell.description: Minimum question count per (company, category) cell before it counts as 'covered'.

question_count.description: Distinct questions in the final list for this (company, category).

evidence_count.description: Total evidence records spanning these questions.

top_questions.description: question_id of the top 3 questions covering this cell.

last_swept_cycle.description: Cycle when a targeted mini-sweep was last issued for this cell.

gaps.description: Subset of cells where is_gap=true. Loop 5 hands this list to the next cycle's Loop 1 as a targeted sweep queue.

search_queries.description: Pre-built Loop-5-suggested queries (e.g. 'Stripe system design interview questions [Y]').
